# Modular Compliance

> Modular Compliance, by Instilligent Limited (NZ). In development. Public marketing copy describing specific product features has been taken down because some claims overstated current capability. No feature inventory is published at this time.

## Status

In development. Marketing copy temporarily withdrawn pending an accurate rewrite.

## What the product actually does today

Modular Compliance holds New Zealand legislation and links the controls and tasks inside a business to specific legislative obligations. Nothing further is claimed about the product at this time.

## Contact

- info@instilligent.com
- Operator: Instilligent Limited (NZBN: 9429051796284)
- Website: https://modularcompliance.com
